introSection: Lightning is a steel launched roller coaster from Vekoma located at Furuvik in Gävle, Gävleborgs, Sweden.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Lightning is a Family Launch Coaster installation from Vekoma.

fullText:
Lightning is a steel launched roller coaster from Vekoma located at Furuvik in Gävle, Gävleborgs, Sweden.

Lightning opened on 3 June 2023.

Lightning is a Family Launch Coaster installation from Vekoma.
